data.title: European markets slightly higher, led by defense stocks
data.description:
London (UKX) -0.01% to 8,766. UK's unemployment rate held steady at 4.4% from October to December 2024, lower than estimates of 4.5%.

Germany (DAX:IND) +0.01% to 22,799

France (CAC:IND) -0.08% to 8,182. The inflation rate in France increased to 1.70% in January from 1.30% in December, above estimates of 1.4%.

Industrial production in Switzerland rose by 2.3% Y/Y in Q4.

The annual inflation rate in Sweden rose to 0.9% in January.

The pan-European Stoxx 600 (STOXX) edged 0.04% higher as geopolitical tensions in the region boosted defense stocks, as European leaders called for higher defense spending at an emergency meeting in Paris. The Stoxx 600 Aerospace and Defense index, a gauge for the region's defense stocks, rose 4.6% to a record closing high on Monday.

Coming up in the session: Euro Area and Germany economic sentiment expected shortly.

In the bond market, the U.S. 10-year Treasury yield was up 4 basis points to 4.51%.

Germany's 10-year yield was up 2 basis points to 2.50%.

UK's 10-year yield was up 3 basis points to 4.56%.

Currencies: (EUR:USD) (GBP:USD) (CHF:USD)

ETFs: (EWG), (GF), (EWI), (EWQ), (FGM), (DAX), (FLGR), (FXB), (EWU), (FKU), (EWUS), (FLGB), (GREK).

data.title: Baidu Non-GAAP EPADS of $2.63 beats by $0.78, revenue of $4.67B beats by $70M
data.description:
• Baidu press release (NASDAQ:BIDU): Q4 Non-GAAP EPADS of $2.63 beats by $0.78.
  • Revenue of $4.67B (-2.0% Y/Y) beats by $70M.
  • Revenue from Baidu Core was RMB27.7 billion ($3.80 billion), increasing 1% year over year; online marketing revenue was RMB17.9 billion ($2.46 billion), decreasing 7% year over year, and non-online marketing revenue was RMB9.8 billion ($1.34 billion), up 18% year over year, mainly driven by AI Cloud business.
  • Revenue from iQIYI was RMB6.6 billion ($906 million), decreasing 14% year over year.
  • In December 2024, Baidu App's MAUs reached 679 million, up 2% year over year.
  • As of December 31, 2024, cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash and short-term investments were $19.06 billion, and cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash and short-term investments excluding iQIYI were $18.45 billion.
  • Free cash flow was $3 million, and free cash flow excluding iQIYI was negative $65 million.

  • More on Baidu

    • Baidu: Well Placed To Benefit From DeepSeek Hype
    • Baidu: Big AI Upside With Downside Protection
    • Baidu: The AI Catalyst I've Been Waiting For Is Finally Here (Rating Upgrade)
    • Baidu's stock falls amid speculation over Xi meeting - report
    • Apple's China AI moves are 'big step forward,' Wedbush says

data.title: OpenAI said to mull special voting rights to block hostile bids
data.description:
OpenAI is weighing special voting rights for its non-profit board to preserve its directors' decision-making power, sources told the Financial Times, a move that could help the ChatGPT maker fend off future hostile takeover attempts.

If granted, the special voting rights would allow the non-profit board to overrule major OpenAI investors like Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) and SoftBank (OTCPK:SFTBY).

The special voting rights are among new governance measures being evaluated by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and board members as the company transitions to a for-profit structure.

OpenAI last week turned down a $97.4B takeover offer by consortium led by Elon Musk, who co-founded the company in 2015, but chose to leave in 2018.

"OpenAI is not for sale, and the board has unanimously rejected Musk's latest attempt to disrupt his competition," the company's chairman Bret Taylor had stated.

data.title: TotalEnergies and Air Liquide to invest over €1B in two large-scale electrolyzer projects
data.description:
TotalEnergies (NYSE:TTE) has signed agreements with Air Liquide (OTCPK:AIQUF) to develop two projects in the Netherlands, for the production and delivery of some 45,000 tons a year of green hydrogen produced using renewable power, the companies said on Tuesday.

The two projects represent a combined investment of more than 1 billion euros ($1.05 billion), Air Liquide (OTCPK:AIQUF) said in a separate statement.

These projects are expected to cut CO2 emissions from TotalEnergies’ (NYSE:TTE) refineries in Belgium and the Netherlands by up to 450,000 tons a year.

The two companies have signed an agreement to set up a joint venture, equally held by TotalEnergies and Air Liquide, which will build and operate a 250 MW electrolyzer near the Zeeland refinery.

This project will enable the production of up to 30,000 tons of green hydrogen a year, most of which will be delivered to Zeeland’s platform, the companies said in a statement.

The electrolyzer will be commissioned in 2029 and will cut the site’s CO2 emissions by up to 300,000 tons a year. This project represents a global investment of around €600 million for both partners and has made requests for support under European and national subsidy programs.

In addition, as part of Air Liquide's 200 MW ELYgator electrolyzer project located in Maasvlakte (Netherlands), TotalEnergies (TTE) has signed a tolling agreement for 130 MW to be dedicated to the production of 15,000 tons per year of green hydrogen for the TotalEnergies platform in Antwerp.

Under this agreement, TotalEnergies will supply the renewable electrons produced by the OranjeWind project to Air Liquide to be transformed into green hydrogen. The project is expected to be operational by the end of 2027 and will reduce CO2 emissions at the Antwerp site by up to 150,000 tons per year.

data.title: Argo plans to incorporate Argo Green Concrete Solutions division in USA
data.description:
Argo Living Soils (OTCPK:ARLSF) has announced plans to incorporate a new subsidiary, Argo Green Concrete Solutions Inc., in Nevada, USA. This strategic move marks the company's entry into the green concrete market, which focuses on developing and commercializing environmentally friendly solutions using bio-graphene technology.

The move is in line with its commitment to sustainability and organic agricultural products.

The innovative project seeks to develop concrete that is over twice as strong and four times as water-resistant compared to current alternatives, all while considerably lowering the CO2 emissions linked to conventional cement manufacturing.

The enterprise will utilize its collaboration with PT Aplikasi Grafena Industri & Consulting (AGIC) in Indonesia to expedite the product development process.

Furthermore, Argo has contracted Apaton Finance GmbH for marketing support from February 20 to April 30, 2025, for a fee of EUR10,000, to boost public knowledge of the company's offerings and securities.

data.title: KKR to buy additional 5% stake in Eni biofuel business, taking total ownership to 30%
data.description:
KKR (NYSE:KKR) to acquire an additional 5% stake in Eni's (NYSE:E) biofuel business, Enilive, for €587.5M (~$614.17M). This transaction increases KKR's total ownership in Enilive to 30% while Eni (NYSE:E) retains control of the company.

"KKR's additional investment confirms the attractiveness of Enilive to the market. Enilive is a solid and growing company, with an important financial partner, and it will play a crucial role in reducing emissions generated by the end use of our products, which is a key aspect of our path to Net zero by 2050." said Francesco Gattei, Chief Transition & Financial Officer of Eni (E).

This latest investment follows a previous agreement made in October 2024, where KKR agreed to purchase a 25% stake in Enilive, which is expected to close by the end of March this year. Both transactions are based on a post-money valuation of €11.75B for Enilive's entire equity.

The deal is still subject to regulatory approvals.

data.title: Bank Cyprus reports FY results
data.description:
• Bank Cyprus press release (OTCPK:BKCYF): FY GAAP EPS of €1.14.
  • NII at €822 mn up 4% yoy; 4Q2024 NII down 3% qoq to €198 mn, mainly reflecting the decline in interest rates
  • Total operating expenses2 up 8% yoy to €367 mn, due to higher staff costs, IT, marketing and professional fees
  • Cost to income ratio2 remains low at 34%; 4Q2024 cost to income ratio2 at 38% largely due to quarterly seasonally higher expenses
  • Profit after tax of €508 mn up 4% yoy, of which €107 mn in 4Q2024

data.title: France inflation rises more than expected to 1.7% in January
data.description:
The inflation rate in France increased to 1.70% in January from 1.30% in December, above estimates of 1.4%.

The Consumer Price Index in France increased 0.10% in January over the previous month.

ETFs: (NYSEARCA:EWQ)

Currency: (EUR:USD)

data.title: European futures point to higher open as U.S.-Russia peace talks set to begin
data.description:
European futures rose overnight as peace talks between the U.S. and Russia begin in Saudi Arabia, a day after expectations of increased military spending pushed the region's defense stocks to all-time highs on Monday.

Euro Stoxx 50 futures were up 0.1% overnight. The pan-European STOXX 600 (STOXX) ended Monday 0.5% higher, led by defense stocks, as European leaders called for higher defense spending at an emergency meeting in Paris.

The Stoxx 600 Aerospace and Defense index, a gauge for the region's defense stocks, rose 4.6% to a record closing high on Monday. Germany's Renk Group +16.6% and Rheinmetall +14%, Sweden's Saab +16.2%, the U.K.'s BAE Systems +7.9%.

French President Emmanuel Macron called an emergency meeting of European leaders on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump arranged peace talks with Russia, excluding European allies and Ukraine. U.S. and Russian officials have convened in Saudi Arabia on Tuesday for negotiations.

Trump's decision forced European leaders to accept that they would have to do more to support Ukraine. However, at the emergency meeting, the leaders were split on deploying peacekeepers to Ukraine, given the risks of a potential direct confrontation with Russia and stretching European military capabilities.

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said he had a long conversation with France's Macron. "We share a common vision: security guarantees must be robust and reliable. Any other decision without such guarantees - such as a fragile ceasefire - would only serve as another deception by Russia and a prelude to a new Russian war against Ukraine or other European nations."
